name: Интеграция с ЕГИСЗ
description: Единый эксплуатационный дашборд обмена с ЕГИСЗ: оперативный контроль, динамика сервиса, очередь без callback, аналитика ошибок и архив документов.

cards.name: Последние операции
cards.description: До 50 последних документов в периоде; сортировка по дате последней активности («Обработано IPS», новые сверху). Одна строка — один dwh_id.

native.query: SELECT ips_date AS "Дата обработки", status_label AS "Статус", clinic_label AS "Клиника", clinic_host AS "Host Клиники (ГОСТ VPN)", semd_label AS "СЭМД", semd_local_uid AS "localUid СЭМД", semd_emdr_id AS "Рег. Номер РЭМД", error_types AS "Типы ошибки" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] ORDER BY ips_date DESC LIMIT 50

cards.name: Транзакции по дням и статусам
cards.description: Документы с вердиктом РЭМД по дням и исходу (stacked, без «Отправлено»). Клик по сегменту — архив с фильтром по статусу.

native.query: SELECT ips_date::date AS "Дата", status_label AS "Статус", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status <> 'waiting' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] GROUP BY ips_date::date, status_label, status_sort ORDER BY ips_date::date, status_sort

cards.name: Статусы за период
cards.description: Распределение документов с вердиктом РЭМД по исходу за период (без «Отправлено» — у них ещё нет результата).

native.query: SELECT status_label AS "Статус", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status <> 'waiting' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] GROUP BY status_label, status_sort ORDER BY status_sort

cards.name: Топ по типу ошибки
cards.description: Рейтинг атомарных видов ошибки (`error_type`) по числу документов в срезе. Колонка «%» — доля документов с этим типом от всех документов с ошибками.

native.query: WITH base AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_category), ''), 'Прочие') AS cat, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), 'Неизвестная ошибка') AS typ, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(responsibility), ''), 'смешанная') AS resp, is_retryable AS retryable, dwh_id FROM public.rpt_error_breakdown WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] ), totals AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::numeric AS total FROM base ), per_type AS ( SELECT cat, typ, resp, retryable, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS cnt FROM base GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 ) SELECT cat AS "Категория ошибки", typ AS "Тип ошибки", resp AS "Зона ответственности", CASE WHEN retryable THEN 'да' ELSE 'нет' END AS "Устраняется повтором", cnt AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * cnt / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM totals), 0), 1) AS "%" FROM per_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

cards.name: Успешность по типам СЭМД
cards.description: Доля успешных документов по **типу СЭМД** (код · НСИ). Метрика: COUNT(DISTINCT «ID») по статусу. Строки без кода/типа СЭМД отсекаются.

native.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), 'Неизвестно') AS "Код СЭМД", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Всего", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status='success')::bigint AS "Успешно", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('async_error', 'network_error'))::bigint AS "Ошибок", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status='success') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')), 0), 1) AS "% успеха" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error') AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

cards.name: Объём по клиникам
cards.description: Топ клиник по числу документов (DISTINCT «ID»), все статусы. Колонка «%» — доля от общего числа документов в срезе.

native.query: WITH filtered AS ( SELECT clinic_jid, clinic_label, dwh_id FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] ), totals AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::numeric AS total FROM filtered ), per_clinic AS ( SELECT clinic_jid::text AS "JID Клиники", clinic_label AS "Клиника", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS cnt FROM filtered GROUP BY clinic_jid, clinic_label ) SELECT "JID Клиники", "Клиника", cnt AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * cnt / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM totals), 0), 1) AS "%" FROM per_clinic ORDER BY cnt DESC

cards.name: Успешность по клиникам
cards.description: По клиникам, COUNT DISTINCT «ID». «Всего документов» — единый документный универсум (все 4 статуса). % успеха — по финализированным (success + ошибки), без «Отправлено». Строки без JID отсекаются.

native.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_jid::text), ''), 'Неизвестно') AS "JID Клиники", COALESCE(MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_name::text), '')), 'Неизвестно') AS "Клиника", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Всего", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status='success')::bigint AS "Успешно", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status='async_error')::bigint AS "Отказ РЭМД", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status='waiting')::bigint AS "Отправлено", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status='success') / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')), 0), 1) AS "% успеха" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_jid::text), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] GROUP BY 1 HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) > 0 ORDER BY 3 DESC

cards.name: Объём ошибок по клиникам
cards.description: Топ-8 клиник по объёму отказов (async_error + network_error) и строка «Прочие» с взвешенным % ошибок. Детальная разбивка по видам — вкладка **Анализ ошибок**.

native.query: WITH filtered AS ( SELECT clinic_jid, clinic_label, clinic_name, dwh_id, status FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status IN ('success','async_error','network_error') AND NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_jid::text), '') IS NOT NULL [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] ), per_clinic AS ( SELECT clinic_jid::text AS jid, COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(clinic_name), ''), 'JID ' || clinic_jid::text) AS lbl, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS total, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('async_error','network_error'))::bigint AS errs FROM filtered GROUP BY clinic_jid, clinic_label, clinic_name ), ranked AS ( SELECT jid, lbl, errs, total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY errs DESC, total DESC) AS rn FROM per_clinic WHERE errs > 0 ), bounds AS ( SELECT 8 AS top_n ), top AS ( SELECT r.jid, r.lbl, r.errs, r.total FROM ranked r, bounds b WHERE r.rn <= b.top_n ), tail AS ( SELECT COUNT(r.jid)::int AS cnt, COALESCE(SUM(r.errs), 0)::bigint AS errs, COALESCE(SUM(r.total), 0)::numeric AS total FROM ranked r, bounds b WHERE r.rn > b.top_n ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT jid AS "JID Клиники", lbl AS "Клиника", errs AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * errs / NULLIF(total, 0), 1) AS "% ошибок" FROM top UNION ALL SELECT NULL::text, 'Прочие (' || t.cnt || ')', t.errs, ROUND(100.0 * t.errs / NULLIF(t.total, 0), 1) FROM tail t WHERE t.cnt > 0 ) u ORDER BY "Документов" DESC

cards.name: Тепловая карта: клиника × день
cards.description: Тепловая карта по колбэкам: календарный день из **Обработано IPS**, клиника, доля ошибок (%). Учёт документов — COUNT(DISTINCT «ID»), как в эталоне «Итоги по ошибкам». Фильтры дашборда: период **«Обработано IPS»**, **JID Клиники**, **Тип СЭМД**; без выбранного периода даты в SQL не режутся.

native.query: WITH d AS ( SELECT date_trunc('day', ips_date)::date AS day, COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(clinic_label), ''), 'JID ' || clinic_jid::text) AS clinic, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('async_error', 'network_error')) AS err FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_jid::text), '') IS NOT NULL [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] GROUP BY 1, 2 ) SELECT day AS "День", clinic AS "Клиника", ROUND(100.0 * err / NULLIF(cnt, 0), 1) AS "Доля ошибок, %" FROM d ORDER BY 1, 2

cards.name: Отказы по часам: связь и асинхронный ответ
cards.description: Почасовая динамика двух типов отказов на одном графике; ось — «Дата обработки» (`rpt_documents`). Период — фильтр «Обработано IPS».

native.query: SELECT date_trunc('hour', ips_date) AS "Час", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'network_error')::bigint AS "Ошибка связи", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'async_error')::bigint AS "Ошибка асинхронного ответа РЭМД" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status IN ('async_error', 'network_error') [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

cards.name: РЭМД vs связь
cards.description: Доля отказов РЭМД и связи за период (компактный индикатор).

native.query: SELECT CASE status WHEN 'async_error' THEN 'Ошибка асинхронного ответа РЭМД' WHEN 'network_error' THEN 'Ошибка связи' END AS "Статус", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status IN ('async_error', 'network_error') [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] GROUP BY 1 HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) > 0 ORDER BY 2 DESC

cards.name: Детализация healthcheck
cards.description: Сигналы ELT-контура без очереди документов без callback; документы без ответа — вкладка **Отправленные** дашборда «Интеграция с ЕГИСЗ».

native.query: SELECT "Сигнал", "Уровень", "Значение", "Единица", "База расчёта", "Что делать" FROM public.rpt_health_signals WHERE "Код сигнала" NOT IN ('queue_24h', 'pending_backlog_24h') ORDER BY CASE "Уровень" WHEN 'red' THEN 0 WHEN 'yellow' THEN 1 WHEN 'green' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, "Код сигнала"

cards.name: Контроль качества данных
cards.description: Сводный контроль полноты и целостности по финализированным документам за период: без JID Клиники; расхождение OID и JID (несовпадение OID организации/клиники или JID по хосту vs справочнику); без localUid СЭМД; без кода вида ЭМД; успешные ответы РЭМД без даты обработки. Ненулевые значения — сигнал для Data Ops. Детализация — карточка ниже. Фильтры — общий период **«Обработано IPS»**, **JID Клиники**, **Код СЭМД**.

native.query:
SELECT "Проверка", "Документов" FROM (
  SELECT 1 AS ord, 'Документов без JID' AS "Проверка",
    COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (
      WHERE NULLIF(BTRIM(clinic_jid::text), '') IS NULL
    )::bigint AS "Документов"
  FROM public.rpt_documents
  WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')
    [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]]
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 2, 'Расхождение OID и JID',
    COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (
      WHERE clinic_jid_mismatch = true
    )::bigint
  FROM public.rpt_documents
  WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')
    [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]]
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3, 'Без localUid СЭМД',
    COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (
      WHERE NULLIF(BTRIM(semd_local_uid::text), '') IS NULL
    )::bigint
  FROM public.rpt_documents
  WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')
    [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]]
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 4, 'Без кода СЭМД',
    COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (
      WHERE NULLIF(BTRIM(semd_code::text), '') IS NULL
    )::bigint
  FROM public.rpt_documents
  WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')
    [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]]
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 5, 'Успех без даты обработки',
    COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (
      WHERE status = 'success' AND ips_date IS NULL
    )::bigint
  FROM public.rpt_documents
  WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')
    [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]]
) q ORDER BY ord

cards.name: Детализация контроля качества
cards.description: Документы с любым нарушением правил сводной таблицы «Контроль качества данных» за период. Колонка «Нарушения» перечисляет сработавшие проверки; ячейки с нарушениями и расхождениями источников подсвечены красным. Лимит 1000 строк.

native.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    rpt_documents.ips_date AS "Дата обработки",
    rpt_documents.status_label AS "Статус",
    rpt_documents.clinic_label AS "Клиника",
    rpt_documents.semd_code AS "Код СЭМД",
    rpt_documents.semd_name AS "Наименование СЭМД",
    rpt_documents.semd_local_uid AS "localUid СЭМД",
    rpt_document_lineage.clinic_jid::text AS "JID Клиники",
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml), '') IS NOT NULL
       AND (
         (NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons), '') IS NOT NULL
          AND btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml) <> btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons))
         OR (NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license), '') IS NOT NULL
          AND btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml) <> btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license))
       )
      THEN '↯ ' || rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml
      ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml), ''), '—')
    END AS "OID из XML",
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons), '') IS NOT NULL
       AND (
         (NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml), '') IS NOT NULL
          AND btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons) <> btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml))
         OR (NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license), '') IS NOT NULL
          AND btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons) <> btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license))
       )
      THEN '↯ ' || rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons
      ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons), ''), '—')
    END AS "OID из JPERSONS",
    CASE
      WHEN NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license), '') IS NOT NULL
       AND (
         (NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml), '') IS NOT NULL
          AND btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license) <> btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_xml))
         OR (NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons), '') IS NOT NULL
          AND btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license) <> btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_jpersons))
       )
      THEN '↯ ' || rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license
      ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_oid_license), ''), '—')
    END AS "OID из лицензий",
    COALESCE(NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_host), ''), '—') AS "Host Клиники (ГОСТ VPN)",
    COALESCE(NULLIF(btrim(rpt_document_lineage.clinic_jid_resolve_method), ''), '—') AS "Метод резолва JID",
    rpt_documents.clinic_jid_mismatch AS "Расхождение источников JID",
    TRIM(BOTH ' · ' FROM CONCAT_WS(' · ',
      CASE WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM(rpt_documents.clinic_jid::text), '') IS NULL THEN 'без JID' END,
      CASE WHEN rpt_documents.clinic_jid_mismatch = true THEN 'расхождение OID/JID' END,
      CASE WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM(rpt_documents.semd_local_uid::text), '') IS NULL THEN 'без localUid' END,
      CASE WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM(rpt_documents.semd_code::text), '') IS NULL THEN 'без кода СЭМД' END,
      CASE WHEN rpt_documents.status = 'success' AND rpt_documents.ips_date IS NULL THEN 'успех без даты' END
    )) AS "Нарушения"
  FROM public.rpt_documents
  INNER JOIN public.rpt_document_lineage
    ON rpt_document_lineage.dwh_id = rpt_documents.dwh_id
  WHERE rpt_documents.status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')
    [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]]
)
SELECT *
FROM base
WHERE "Нарушения" <> ''
ORDER BY "Дата обработки" DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1000

cards.name: Тренд ошибок связи по дням
cards.description: Календарная динамика транспортных сбоев; всплески выше типичного уровня — кандидаты на разбор.

native.query: SELECT date_trunc('day', ips_date)::date AS "День", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Документов с ошибкой связи" FROM public.rpt_network_errors WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

cards.name: Топ клиник по сбоям транспорта
cards.description: Топ-8 клиник по числу транспортных сбоев за период; хвост свёрнут в «Остальные».

native.query: WITH per_clinic AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_name), ''), 'Неизвестно') AS lbl, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS cnt FROM public.rpt_network_errors WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] GROUP BY 1 ), ranked AS ( SELECT lbl, cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rn FROM per_clinic ), tail AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt), 0)::bigint AS tail_cnt FROM ranked WHERE rn > 8 ) SELECT CASE WHEN r.rn <= 8 THEN r.lbl ELSE 'Остальные (' || t.tail_cnt::text || ')' END AS "Клиника", SUM(r.cnt)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM ranked r CROSS JOIN tail t GROUP BY CASE WHEN r.rn <= 8 THEN r.lbl ELSE 'Остальные (' || t.tail_cnt::text || ')' END ORDER BY 2 DESC

cards.name: Типы сетевых ошибок (за период)
cards.description: Топ-8 нормализованных типов транспортных ошибок за период; хвост свёрнут. Сырой текст — «Последние сбои транспорта».

native.query: WITH per_kind AS ( SELECT LEFT(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(network_error_type), ''), 'Неизвестно'), 120) AS lbl, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS cnt FROM public.rpt_network_errors WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] GROUP BY 1 ), ranked AS ( SELECT lbl, cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rn FROM per_kind ), tail AS ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt), 0)::bigint AS tail_cnt FROM ranked WHERE rn > 8 ) SELECT CASE WHEN r.rn <= 8 THEN r.lbl ELSE 'Остальные (' || t.tail_cnt::text || ')' END AS "Тип сетевой ошибки", SUM(r.cnt)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM ranked r CROSS JOIN tail t GROUP BY CASE WHEN r.rn <= 8 THEN r.lbl ELSE 'Остальные (' || t.tail_cnt::text || ')' END ORDER BY 2 DESC

cards.name: Последние сбои транспорта
cards.description: Последние 50 транспортных сбоев за период для L2: тип, фрагмент текста, LOGID/MSGID.

native.query: SELECT ips_date AS "Создано", clinic_label AS "Клиника", LEFT(network_error_type, 80) AS "Тип", LEFT(error_text, 140) AS "Сообщение", logid AS logid, result_msgid AS message_id FROM public.rpt_network_errors WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] ORDER BY ips_date DESC LIMIT 50

cards.name: В очереди (всего)
cards.description: Все документы без callback в выбранном срезе.

native.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT semd_local_uid)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents_waiting WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{wait_segment}}]]

cards.name: Зависших >3 дней
cards.description: Документы в очереди дольше 3 суток (жёлтая зона эскалации).

native.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT semd_local_uid)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents_waiting WHERE wait_segment IN ('>3 дней', '>7 дней', '>30 дней') [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{wait_segment}}]]

cards.name: Зависших >7 дней
cards.description: Документы в очереди дольше 7 суток (красная зона эскалации).

native.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT semd_local_uid)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents_waiting WHERE wait_segment IN ('>7 дней', '>30 дней') [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{wait_segment}}]]

cards.name: Зависших >30 дней
cards.description: Архивный хвост очереди (серый сегмент).

native.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT semd_local_uid)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents_waiting WHERE wait_segment = '>30 дней' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{wait_segment}}]]

cards.name: Очередь без ответа
cards.description: До 200 строк; сортировка по возрасту (старые сверху). Подсветка строк по сегменту ожидания.

native.query: SELECT semd_local_uid AS "localUid СЭМД", semd_code AS "Код СЭМД", semd_name AS "Наименование СЭМД", clinic_jid::text AS "JID Клиники", clinic_label AS "Клиника", first_sent_at AS "Дата отправки", waiting_days AS "Дней в ожидании", wait_segment AS "Сегмент ожидания" FROM public.rpt_documents_waiting WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{wait_segment}}]] ORDER BY first_sent_at ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200

cards.name: Топ клиник в очереди по документам
cards.description: Клиники с наибольшим числом документов без callback.

native.query: SELECT clinic_jid::text AS "JID Клиники", clinic_label AS "Клиника", COUNT(DISTINCT semd_local_uid)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents_waiting WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{wait_segment}}]] GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 3 DESC LIMIT 15

cards.name: Сегменты ожидания
cards.description: Распределение очереди по сегментам из DWH (до 3 / >3 / >7 / >30 дней).

native.query: SELECT wait_segment AS "Сегмент ожидания", COUNT(DISTINCT semd_local_uid)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents_waiting WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{wait_segment}}]] GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(waiting_days) DESC NULLS LAST

cards.name: Топ типов СЭМД в очереди
cards.description: Распределение документов без ответа по подписи СЭМД.

native.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), '(неизвестно)') AS "Код СЭМД", COUNT(DISTINCT semd_local_uid)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents_waiting WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{wait_segment}}]] GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20

cards.name: Топ типов СЭМД по ошибкам
cards.description: Топ-8 кодов СЭМД по объёму отказов РЭМД + «Прочие». Колонка «%» — доля ошибок среди всех документов данного типа (не доля в общем числе ошибок).

native.query: WITH per_code AS ( SELECT semd_label AS label, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS total, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('async_error','network_error'))::bigint AS errs FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status IN ('success','async_error','network_error') AND NULLIF(TRIM(semd_label), '') IS NOT NULL [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] GROUP BY 1 ), ranked AS ( SELECT label, total, errs, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY errs DESC) AS rn FROM per_code WHERE errs > 0 ) SELECT CASE WHEN rn <= 8 THEN label ELSE 'Прочие' END AS "СЭМД", SUM(errs)::bigint AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * SUM(errs) / NULLIF(SUM(total), 0), 1) AS "%" FROM ranked GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

cards.name: Топ типов СЭМД по видам ошибки
cards.description: Вертикальный stacked-bar: код СЭМД, сегменты — виды ошибки. Топ-15 кодов по объёму ошибок; метрика — COUNT(DISTINCT документ), на столбце — сумма (total).

native.query: WITH base AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), 'Неизвестно') AS t, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), 'Неизвестная ошибка') AS k, dwh_id AS doc FROM public.rpt_error_breakdown WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), '') <> '' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] ), totals AS ( SELECT t, COUNT(DISTINCT doc) AS total FROM base GROUP BY t ), ranked_semd AS ( SELECT t, total, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY total DESC, t) AS rn FROM totals ), per_pair AS ( SELECT b.t, b.k, COUNT(DISTINCT b.doc)::bigint AS docs FROM base b GROUP BY 1, 2 ), ranked_pair AS ( SELECT p.t, p.k, p.docs, r.total, r.rn AS semd_rn, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.t ORDER BY p.docs DESC, p.k) AS type_rn FROM per_pair p JOIN ranked_semd r ON r.t = p.t ) SELECT t AS "СЭМД", k AS "Тип ошибки", docs AS "Документов" FROM ranked_pair WHERE semd_rn <= 15 AND type_rn <= 5 ORDER BY semd_rn, t, type_rn

cards.name: Топ по типу ошибки
cards.description: Рейтинг атомарных видов ошибки (`error_type`) по числу документов в срезе. Колонка «%» — доля документов с этим типом от всех документов с ошибками.

native.query: WITH base AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_category), ''), 'Прочие') AS cat, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), 'Неизвестная ошибка') AS typ, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(responsibility), ''), 'смешанная') AS resp, is_retryable AS retryable, dwh_id FROM public.rpt_error_breakdown WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] ), totals AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::numeric AS total FROM base ), per_type AS ( SELECT cat, typ, resp, retryable, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS cnt FROM base GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4 ) SELECT cat AS "Категория ошибки", typ AS "Тип ошибки", resp AS "Зона ответственности", CASE WHEN retryable THEN 'да' ELSE 'нет' END AS "Устраняется повтором", cnt AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * cnt / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM totals), 0), 1) AS "%" FROM per_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

cards.name: Топ категорий и типов ошибки
cards.description: Категория ошибки (ось) × тип (стэк), документов COUNT(DISTINCT «ID»). Каждый вид окрашен цветом своей категории.

native.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), 'Неизвестная ошибка') AS "Тип ошибки", COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_category), ''), 'Прочие') AS "Категория ошибки", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_error_breakdown WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 3 DESC

cards.name: Ошибки: тип × клиника
cards.description: Тип ошибки × клиника: COUNT(DISTINCT «ID») и доля от финализированного документного универсума клиники. Клик — модель «Разбивка ошибок» (грейн тип×документ) с точным фильтром по типу ошибки и JID клиники из строки и фильтрами дашборда.

native.query: WITH period_docs AS ( SELECT dwh_id, clinic_jid::text AS clinic_jid FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error') AND NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_jid::text), '') IS NOT NULL [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] ), base AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rpt_error_breakdown.error_type), ''), 'Неизвестная ошибка') AS error_type, rpt_error_breakdown.clinic_label AS clinic_label, rpt_error_breakdown.clinic_jid::text AS clinic_jid, rpt_error_breakdown.dwh_id FROM public.rpt_error_breakdown INNER JOIN period_docs pd ON pd.dwh_id = rpt_error_breakdown.dwh_id WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(rpt_error_breakdown.error_type), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{error_type}}]] ), error_clinic AS ( SELECT error_type, clinic_label, clinic_jid, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS doc_count FROM base GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ), clinic_totals AS ( SELECT clinic_jid, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::numeric AS total_docs FROM period_docs GROUP BY clinic_jid ), rule_patterns AS ( SELECT interpretation AS error_type, (array_agg(COALESCE(match_code, '') || match_pattern ORDER BY match_tier, rule_code))[1] AS error_pattern FROM public.dim_error_rules WHERE is_active GROUP BY interpretation ) SELECT ec.error_type AS "Тип ошибки", ec.clinic_label AS "Клиника", COALESCE(rp.error_pattern, ec.error_type) AS "Паттерн ошибки", ec.clinic_jid AS "JID Клиники", ec.doc_count AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * ec.doc_count / NULLIF(ct.total_docs, 0), 1) AS "% ошибок" FROM error_clinic ec JOIN clinic_totals ct ON ct.clinic_jid = ec.clinic_jid LEFT JOIN rule_patterns rp ON rp.error_type = ec.error_type ORDER BY ec.doc_count DESC

cards.name: % ошибок: клиника × тип СЭМД
cards.description: Срез доли ошибок по парам **клиника × тип СЭМД (код · НСИ)**. Метрика: COUNT(DISTINCT «ID»). «% ошибок» = документы со статусом «Ошибка асинхронного ответа РЭМД» или «Ошибка связи» к финализированным (success + ошибки) в срезе. Показаны только пары с ≥1 ошибкой; сортировка по убыванию доли ошибок, затем по объёму. «Всего» — финализированные документы в паре (контекст знаменателя: % на 1 документе шумит). Без ограничения числа строк.

native.query: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_jid::text), ''), 'Неизвестно') AS "JID Клиники", COALESCE(MAX(NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_name::text), '')), 'Неизвестно') AS "Клиника", COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), 'Неизвестно') AS "Код СЭМД", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error'))::bigint AS "Всего", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('async_error', 'network_error'))::bigint AS "Ошибок", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('async_error', 'network_error')) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error')), 0), 1) AS "% ошибок" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE status IN ('success', 'async_error', 'network_error') AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(clinic_jid::text), ''), '') <> '' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] GROUP BY 1, 3 HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('async_error', 'network_error')) > 0 ORDER BY 4 DESC, 5 DESC

cards.name: % ошибок: тип ошибки × тип СЭМД
cards.description: Срез **тип ошибки × тип СЭМД (код · НСИ)** по атомарным видам из `rpt_error_breakdown`. Метрика: COUNT(DISTINCT «ID»). «% ошибок» = документы с этим видом ошибки к документам с ЛЮБЫМ видом ошибки в этом типе СЭМД (знаменатель — COUNT(DISTINCT документ) по типу СЭМД, без двойного счёта мульти-ошибочных документов). Сортировка: вид ошибки, затем % и объём по убыванию — строки одного вида рядом, удобно искать всплески одной ошибки по разным типам СЭМД. Без ограничения числа строк.

native.query: WITH pairs AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), 'Неизвестная ошибка') AS err, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), 'Неизвестно') AS semd, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS docs FROM public.rpt_error_breakdown WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), '') <> '' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] GROUP BY 1, 2 ), semd_totals AS ( SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), 'Неизвестно') AS semd, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::numeric AS total FROM public.rpt_error_breakdown WHERE COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(semd_code), ''), '') <> '' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(error_type), ''), '') <> '' [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] GROUP BY 1 ) SELECT p.err AS "Тип ошибки", p.semd AS "Код СЭМД", p.docs AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * p.docs / NULLIF(t.total, 0), 1) AS "% ошибок" FROM pairs p JOIN semd_totals t ON t.semd = p.semd ORDER BY 3 DESC, 4 DESC

cards.name: Всего документов
cards.description: Общее количество уникальных документов в архиве за выбранный период (все 4 статуса; тот же универсум, что у топов и графика по дням).

native.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{relates_to}}]] [[AND {{emdr_id}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] [[AND {{log_id}}]]

cards.name: Всего клиник
cards.description: Количество уникальных клиник (JID) в архиве за выбранный период.

native.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT clinic_jid)::bigint AS "Клиник" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{relates_to}}]] [[AND {{emdr_id}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] [[AND {{log_id}}]]

cards.name: Динамика документов по дням
cards.description: Поступление документов на прокси по дням первой отправки (first_sent_at). Фильтр «Период» — по дате поступления, не по «Обработано IPS» (ips_date).

native.query: SELECT first_sent_at::date AS "Дата", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS "Документов" FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE first_sent_at::date IS NOT NULL [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{local_uid}}]] [[AND {{relates_to}}]] [[AND {{emdr_id}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] [[AND {{log_id}}]] GROUP BY first_sent_at::date ORDER BY first_sent_at::date ASC

cards.name: Объём по клиникам
cards.description: Топ клиник по числу документов (DISTINCT «ID»), все статусы. Колонка «%» — доля от общего числа документов в срезе.

native.query: WITH filtered AS ( SELECT clinic_jid, clinic_label, dwh_id FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] ), totals AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::numeric AS total FROM filtered ), per_clinic AS ( SELECT clinic_jid::text AS "JID Клиники", clinic_label AS "Клиника", COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS cnt FROM filtered GROUP BY clinic_jid, clinic_label ) SELECT "JID Клиники", "Клиника", cnt AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * cnt / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM totals), 0), 1) AS "%" FROM per_clinic ORDER BY cnt DESC

cards.name: Топ типов СЭМД по документам
cards.description: Объём документов по кодам СЭМД в срезе. Колонка «%» — доля от общего числа документов.

native.query: WITH base AS ( SELECT semd_label, COUNT(DISTINCT dwh_id)::bigint AS cnt FROM public.rpt_documents WHERE 1=1 [[AND {{ips_date}}]] [[AND {{semd_type}}]] [[AND {{jid}}]] [[AND {{status}}]] GROUP BY 1 ), totals AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt), 0)::numeric AS total FROM base) SELECT semd_label AS "СЭМД", cnt AS "Документов", ROUND(100.0 * cnt / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM totals), 0), 1) AS "%" FROM base ORDER BY cnt DESC

cards.name: Архив СЭМД
cards.description: Список документов за выбранный период и фильтры. Одна строка — один документ (dwh_id). До 1000 последних по дате обработки.
